response.justification: Bogdan brings ~15 years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year bar, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js work at re:cinq, Optilyz, and RIDE, plus current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) that maps closely to the role. He has React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and a strong testing/TDD culture evidenced by workshops and conference talks. Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and PostgreSQL, but his polyglot background and craftsmanship orientation make these low-risk pickups.
strengths: Current AI-agent/MCP infrastructure experience matches a key required skill
Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js + React track record across multiple senior roles
Strong testing, TDD, and engineering-craftsmanship culture (talks, workshops, course design)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older (2016-2018) and limited
Relational DB experience (PostgreSQL) is light; primary DB exposure is MongoDB/MySQL
